name: @xxxoooxoxo/wiff
description: Deterministic, resumable multi-agent workflows — a harness-agnostic MCP server that orchestrates Codex, Claude, Cursor, and Kimi agents from plain JavaScript, with journaled resume, git worktree isolation, and personas.
